title: EpicFight: Project Babylon - Weapons
description: A universe of weapons for EpicFight.
body:
![weapons_logo_big](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74e54f708689f07006b670977243b50177f72472.png)



![description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7f9bfc707238d5f771b48e42c10b193ae105317.png)



![space_gold](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8d02e08b8066928bbb09565ac8c2e5337f25d99.png)
**THIS MOD IS AN EPIC FIGHT MOD ADDON, WHICH TRIES TO CREATE,COMBINE AND SHARE A NEW EXPERIENCE**

**What this mod adds?**


12 Weapon Types with a custom 3d handmade models for each vanilla and custom material.

3 New Custom Materials.

10 New Effects.

5 New Weapon Skills.

1 Weapon Moveset.

113 Total models for you to use.

Unique Weapon Mechanics and more.


![space_gold](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8d02e08b8066928bbb09565ac8c2e5337f25d99.png)
**Mod Trailer:**

**HARD Dependancies:**

<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Project Babylon - Materials.
- Epic Fight Mod.
- Iron's Spellbooks.
- Geckolib.


**SOFT Dependancies:**


- ACG Battlescythe - Revived.
- EpicFight Ressurection.
- Weapons of Miracles.
- EpicFight Rapier Addon.


</details>


![f.a.q](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8ad1d230b8024e6136522ac323c1350c6ee3052.png)
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Where is armor showed in the trailer? Its a future seperate mod. Stay tuned :D

1.21.1 Please? Someday maybe.

Backport Please? Same answer as above.
